//LOG da Tabela Completa CONFSISTEMA.
&LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&TConCod)) &Tabela = 'CONFSISTEMA'
if &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Delete //CASO FOR DELETE &LogErpRegItmNew = '' For &SdtLogAtributosItem in &SdtLogAtributos prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) EndFor
Else //UPDATE E INSERT For Each Order EmpCod, TConCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TConCod = &TConCod
For &SdtLogAtributosItem in &SdtLogAtributos Do Case Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att = 'TConCod' &LogErpRegItmNew = trim(TConCod.ToFormattedString()) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1,'','', &Tabela, &ObjetoGeradorLog, &wwpContextUserName, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att, &SdtLogAtributosItem.Old, &LogErpRegItmNew, &LogErpRegGUID ) Case &SdtLogAtributosItem.Att =
